board_csa_architect.notes: Fixes hardcoded org_id in auth.ts L25 and L214. Resolves user org mapping to query correct auth_policies row.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Tenant isolation for MFA policy is essential. Current hardcoded Org 0 means all tenants share root policy.
